facebook.caption: Tourists keep walking past this. Khu du lịch Suối Tranh is a waterfall hiking area in Phu Quoc that most resort guests never find. 4.3 stars from 205 reviews. Jungle trails, fresh water, zero beach-bar crowds. If you need a break from sand and sunscreen, this is where locals actually go. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
